description_long: This object consists of a group of large, rectangular intermodal shipping containers arranged in two rows. Each container is constructed from corrugated metal panels and features reinforced corners, visible locking mechanisms, and end doors for access. The containers are painted in a variety of colors including blue, red, green, yellow, orange, black, and white, with several displaying prominent company logos such as Maersk, DHL, FedEx, and Evergreen. The surfaces show realistic weathering and wear, with some containers appearing slightly rusted or faded. The containers are designed to be stacked or placed side by side, typical for use in shipping yards, rail terminals, or industrial storage areas. Their robust construction and standardized size make them suitable for transporting goods over long distances by truck, train, or ship.
description: A group of colorful, weathered metal shipping containers with company logos, reinforced corners, and end doors, arranged in two rows. The containers are designed for industrial transport and storage.
description_view_0: Two rows of shipping containers are seen from above and at an angle, showing the tops and one long side of each container, with visible color variety and some logos.
description_view_1: The containers are viewed from the end, highlighting the company logos and signage on the long sides, with all containers' ends aligned in a row.
description_view_2: The opposite end of the containers is visible, showing the rear doors and locking mechanisms, with the tops and sides also partially visible.
description_view_3: The containers are seen from the other end, displaying more company logos and signage, with the arrangement emphasizing the length and uniformity of the containers.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: multiple printed company logos and markings on long sides and ends
attribute_handles_or_grips: integrated door handles and locking bars on end doors
attribute_placement_location: outdoor ground, shipping yard, rail terminal, or industrial site
